title: IoT Sensor Event — Bronze Source Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating raw IoT production sensor event records before ingestion into brz_freshsip.iot_sensor_events_raw. Records arrive every 5 minutes via micro-batch. Each record represents a single sensor event (batch lifecycle events, QC check results, or downtime events).

event_id.description: Unique event identifier generated by the IoT system; used for deduplication in Silver

batch_id.description: Production batch identifier; groups all related events for a single production run; foreign key to production_batches in Silver

production_line_id.description: Identifier for the production line where the event occurred

event_type.description: Classification of the sensor event; determines which fields are expected to be populated

event_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred; cast to TIMESTAMP in Silver

sku_id.description: SKU being produced in this batch; populated on BATCH_START and BATCH_END events

expected_output_cases.description: Planned output in standard cases for this batch; populated on BATCH_START events; cast to INTEGER in Silver

actual_output_cases.description: Actual output in standard cases; populated on BATCH_END events; cast to INTEGER in Silver

qc_status.description: Quality control inspection result; populated only on QC_CHECK events

downtime_start_ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when downtime began; populated only on DOWNTIME events

downtime_end_ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when downtime ended; populated only on DOWNTIME events after resolution

sensor_temperature.description: Temperature reading from production line sensor in Celsius; cast to DECIMAL in Silver; valid range -10 to 150

sensor_pressure.description: Pressure reading from production line sensor in PSI; cast to DECIMAL in Silver; valid range 0 to 500

operator_id.description: Identifier of the shift operator on duty; informational only; not used in KPI calculations
